originalTitle: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
content: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

originalTitle: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
content: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

originalTitle: New outbreak of Ebola kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
title: New outbreak of Ebola kills 80 in eastern DR Congo
content: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported - a case has also been reported in Uganda.

originalTitle: Hamas confirms killing of Qassam Brigades leader in Israeli attack
title: Hamas confirms killing of Qassam Brigades leader in Israeli attack
content: Israel targeted Izz al-Din al-Haddad, the head of Hamas's armed wing in Gaza, in an attack that killed seven others.

originalTitle: Abu-Bilal al-Minuki: ISIL’s shadow commander in West Africa
title: Abu-Bilal al-Minuki: ISIL’s shadow commander in West Africa
content: Nigeria and the US say 'key' ISIL leader was killed in joint military operation in Borno state.

originalTitle: Iran warns of readiness for war and economic costs as US talks falter
title: Iran warns of readiness for war and economic costs as US talks falter
content: Iranian leaders and TV have ramped up pressure on the US with a stream of messaging to domestic and foreign audiences.

originalTitle: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
content: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

originalTitle: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
content: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

originalTitle: US planning to charge ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
title: US planning to charge ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
content: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

originalTitle: Resilient Celtic time run perfectly to win race after eight-month chase
title: Resilient Celtic time run perfectly to win race after eight-month chase
content: Celtic chased Hearts for eight months, 32 games, 2,880 on-field minutes and 48 hours. In the season's dying embers, they caught them.

originalTitle: Liverpool must return to heavy metal football - Salah
title: Liverpool must return to heavy metal football - Salah
content: Mohamed Salah says Liverpool must return to being a "heavy metal attacking team that opponents fear" after trophyless season.

originalTitle: Man City beat Chelsea after brilliant Semenyo goal
title: Man City beat Chelsea after brilliant Semenyo goal
content: Antoine Semenyo's brilliantly-improvised backheel is enough to give Manchester City a 1-0 win over Chelsea in the FA Cup final, as Pep Guardiola's side complete a domestic cup double at Wembley.
